title: First Day of Class
scene: 新学期第一天，老师自我介绍并点名。

turns.cn: 欢迎大家！请先自我介绍一下。
turns.en: Welcome, everyone! Please introduce yourselves.

turns.cn: 我叫张伟，来自北京，很高兴认识大家。
turns.en: My name is Zhang Wei. I'm from Beijing. Nice to meet you all.

turns.cn: 很好。课程大纲在网站上，请下载。
turns.en: Great. The syllabus is on the website. Please download it.

turns.cn: 老师，教材在哪里买？
turns.en: Professor, where can I buy the textbook?

turns.cn: 学校书店或网上都有。
turns.en: The campus bookstore or online.

turns.cn: 作业什么时候交？
turns.en: When are the assignments due?

turns.cn: 每周日晚上十一点前提交。
turns.en: Every Sunday by eleven PM.

title: Asking the Teacher
scene: 课后你留下来问老师问题。

turns.cn: 老师，我能问您一个问题吗？
turns.en: Professor, could I ask you a question?

turns.cn: 当然，请说。
turns.en: Of course. Go ahead.

turns.cn: 我不太理解今天讲的那个公式。
turns.en: I don't quite understand the formula from today's lecture.

turns.cn: 哪一部分不清楚？
turns.en: Which part is unclear?

turns.cn: 第三步的推导过程。
turns.en: The derivation in step three.

turns.cn: 我画个图给你解释，周三office hour也可以来。
turns.en: Let me draw it out for you. You can also come to office hours on Wednesday.

turns.cn: 谢谢老师，我明白了！
turns.en: Thank you. That makes sense now!

title: Group Project
scene: 你和同学讨论小组项目分工。

turns.cn: 我们得在周五前交报告。
turns.en: We need to turn in the report by Friday.

turns.cn: 我来负责写引言部分吧。
turns.en: I can handle the introduction section.

turns.cn: 好，我做数据分析和图表。
turns.en: Sounds good. I'll do the data analysis and charts.

turns.cn: 周三晚上开个线上会议碰一下？
turns.en: Want to have a Zoom meeting Wednesday night?

turns.cn: 八点可以吗？
turns.en: Does eight o'clock work?

turns.cn: 可以，我把草稿先发群里。
turns.en: Yes. I'll share my draft in the group chat.

turns.cn: 完美，一起加油！
turns.en: Perfect. Let's do this!

title: Library Study Room
scene: 你在图书馆前台预约小组研讨室。

turns.cn: 你好，我想预约一间研讨室。
turns.en: Hi, I'd like to book a study room.

turns.cn: 几个人？用多久？
turns.en: How many people, and for how long?

turns.cn: 四个人，两个小时，今天下午三点。
turns.en: Four people, two hours, starting at three this afternoon.

turns.cn: 三楼302有空，需要学生证。
turns.en: Room 302 on the third floor is open. I'll need your student ID.

turns.cn: 可以带食物进去吗？
turns.en: Are we allowed to bring food in?

turns.cn: 只限饮料，不能带外卖。
turns.en: Drinks only, no takeout food.

turns.cn: 明白了，谢谢！
turns.en: Got it. Thank you!

title: Borrowing Notes
scene: 你生病缺课，向同学借笔记。

turns.cn: 昨天你没来上课吗？我缺了一节。
turns.en: Were you in class yesterday? I missed it.

turns.cn: 我在。老师讲了新章节。
turns.en: I was there. The professor covered a new chapter.

turns.cn: 能借我看一下笔记吗？
turns.en: Could I borrow your notes?

turns.cn: 可以，我今晚拍给你。
turns.en: Sure. I'll take photos and send them tonight.

turns.cn: 作业也改了吗？
turns.en: Did the homework change too?

turns.cn: 延到周五，多做两道练习题。
turns.en: It's due Friday now. Two extra practice problems.

turns.cn: 太感谢了，请你喝奶茶！
turns.en: Thanks so much. I'll buy you bubble tea!

title: Extension Request
scene: 你因故无法按时交作业，发邮件后当面跟老师说明。

turns.cn: 老师，关于论文延期的事，我想当面说一下。
turns.en: Professor, about the extension on my paper, I'd like to explain in person.

turns.cn: 请坐。邮件我看了，家里出事？
turns.en: Have a seat. I read your email. A family emergency?

turns.cn: 是的，我不得不回老家一周。
turns.en: Yes. I had to go back home for a week.

turns.cn: 可以延一周，但不能再晚了。
turns.en: I can give you one more week, but no later than that.

turns.cn: 需要补交什么材料吗？
turns.en: Do I need to submit any supporting documents?

turns.cn: 不用，按时发到系统里就行。
turns.en: No. Just upload it to the system on time.

turns.cn: 谢谢老师理解！
turns.en: Thank you for understanding!
